full_text:
Guo Tong
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Tong. Served Wei as an official to the Inspector of Jingzhou. Guo Huai’s son. Guo Tong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
